371→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() = getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
372→
373→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
374→        psi
375→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
376→            ?.useSiteTarget
377→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
378→
379→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() = getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
380→
381→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
382→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
383→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
384→
385→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstAnnotationEntry() =
386→        this ==
387→            treeParent
388→                .children()
389→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
390→
391→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
392→        this ==
393→            treeParent
394→                .children()
395→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
396→
397→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
398→        siblings(forward = false)
399→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
400→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
401→
402→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
403→        siblings()
404→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
405→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
406→
407→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
408→        siblings(forward = false)
409→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
410→
411→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
412→        siblings(forward = false)
413→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
414→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
415→
416→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() = siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
417→
418→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
419→        siblings(forward = true)
420→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
421→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
422→
423→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(): Boolean {
424→        val annotatedConstruct = findAnnotatedConstruct()
425→        return lastChildLeafOrSelf()
426→            .leaves(forward = true)
427→            .takeWhile { it != annotatedConstruct }
428→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
429→    }
430→
431→    private fun ASTNode.findAnnotatedConstruct(): ASTNode {
432→        val astNode =
433→            if (treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST) {
434→                treeParent
435→            } else {
436→                this
437→            }
438→        return checkNotNull(
439→            astNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextCodeLeaf(),
440→        )
441→    }
442→
443→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
444→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
445→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
446→        } else {
447→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
448→        }
449→
450→    private fun ASTNode.isPartOfPrimaryConstructor(): Boolean =
451→        treeParent?.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST &&
452→            treeParent?.treeParent?.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR
453→
454→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsClassIdentifier(): Boolean {
455→        // Check if the annotation is on the same line as the class identifier/keyword that precedes the primary
456→        // constructor
457→        val primaryConstructor = treeParent.treeParent
458→        return primaryConstructor
459→            .treePrev
460→            ?.let { prevNode ->
461→                !prevNode.textContains('\n')
462→            }
463→            ?: false
464→    }
465→
466→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
467→        node: ASTNode,
468→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
469→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
470→    ) {
471→        node
472→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
473→            .nextCodeLeaf()
474→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
475→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
476→
477→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
478→                    emit(
479→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
480→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
481→                        true,
482→                    )
483→                    if (autoCorrect) {
484→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
485→                    }
486→                }
487→            }
488→    }
489→
490→    private fun visitAnnotation(
491→        node: ASTNode,
492→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
493→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
494→    ) {
495→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
496→
497→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
498→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry())
499→        ) {
500→            emit(
501→                node.startOffset,
502→                "@[...] style annotations should be on a separate line from other annotations.",
503→                true,
504→            )
505→            if (autoCorrect) {
506→                if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
507→                    node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
508→                } else if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
509→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
510→                }
511→            }
512→        }
513→    }
514→
515→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
516→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations =
517→            modifierListRoot
518→                .treeParent
519→                .treePrev
520→        // Make sure we only insert a single newline
521→        val indentWithoutNewline =
522→            nodeBeforeAnnotations
523→                ?.text
524→                .orEmpty()
525→                .substringAfterLast('\n')
526→        return "\n".plus(indentWithoutNewline)
527→    }
528→}

530→public val ANNOTATION_RULE_ID: RuleId = AnnotationRule().ruleId
531→
